nasb.text: If it be so, our God whom we serve is able to deliver us from the furnace of blazing fire; and He will deliver us out of your hand, O king.

esv.text: If this be so, our God whom we serve is able to deliver us from the burning fiery furnace, and he will deliver us out of your hand, O king.

cnv.text: 如果我們被扔在火窯裡，我們所事奉的　神必能拯救我們；王啊！他必拯救我們脫離烈火的窯和你的手。

ccb.text: 王啊，我们若真被扔进烈焰熊熊的火窑，我们所事奉的上帝必能救我们脱离火窑，祂必从你手中救我们。
